action_items: EstimateOne — Submit quote TODAY (closes 12 June): estimateone.com — Access Floors, Ceilings, Carpentry, Partitions. 4 days left.
ICN Gateway — Register free (15 mins): gateway.icn.org.au — List: CNC joinery, bulkheads, access floors, NOC fitout.
AirTrunk MEL2 — Email procurement now: airtrunk.com — Send 1-page capability statement today.
market_intel: AEMO June 2026: 5.4GW in NEM transmission queue — 11 projects, 60% NSW / 40% VIC.
Goodman SYD01: A$5B campus, Phase 1 RFS early 2028. Interior packages being let now.
AirTrunk MEL2: 354MW Melbourne campus at initial power-on. Fitout active — email today.
Quinbrook Supernode: Stage 3 BESS executing. DC fitout packages follow immediately.
Firmus Launceston: $2.1B Stage 1 confirmed underway. Stage 1b follows immediately.
